results.rendered_html: dakṣas (von dakṣ) adj. = dakṣaḥ ā vāṃ bhūṣankṣitayo janma rodasyoḥ pravācyaṃ vṛṣaṇā dakṣase mahe  ṚV. 1,151,3 . tvamiḻā śatahimāsi dakṣase 2,1,11 . yajñā yajñā vo agnaye girā girā ca dakṣase (śaṃsiṣam) 6,48,1 . vṛdhasya dakṣasaḥ ( SV.  dakṣasya) 8,13,1 .
